stat: AI adoption velocity among the UK's largest solicitors' firms, 2020-2023
applies_to: clusters: UK Industry Verticals; Risk, Governance & Legal
method: Recipe C — year-on-year delta derived from SRA Risk Outlook Report (November 2023) data

sources_used.title: SRA Risk Outlook report: The use of artificial intelligence in the legal market

workings: SRA Risk Outlook (November 2023) states that 75% of the largest solicitors' firms were using AI, 'nearly twice the number from just three years ago.' Implied baseline (November 2020): 75% / ~2 = approximately 37.5%. Change over 3 years: 75% minus 37.5% = 37.5 percentage points. Annual adoption velocity: 37.5pp / 3 years = 12.5pp per year, rounded conservatively to 12pp. This calculation was completed before ChatGPT's mainstream availability (November 2022), so actual post-2022 velocity is likely higher.
